backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor that handles AI image generation by building prompts from PoseCriteria, making HTTP outcalls to Hugging Face inference endpoints, and storing prompt history and presets using blob storage and map/list data structures.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the full AI Image Studio redeployment feature to its relevant frontend files, component dependencies, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's React components, hooks, constants, and styles.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, card, border, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA that mounts the app into a root div and loads the TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the Header, Footer, ImageGenerationForm, ImageDisplay, and PromptHistory components, manages generation state, and orchestrates image generation via useGenerateImage and useSendQueries hooks.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying a dynamic copyright year and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking parameters derived from the current hostname.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header component showing the AI Image Studio branding with a gradient Sparkles icon and a 'Powered by Hugging Face' subtitle.
frontend/src/components/ImageDisplay.tsx: Component that renders the generated image, a loading spinner, or user-friendly error messages with specific handling for Hugging Face API error codes (401, 503, 429, 400, empty response) and IC canister traps.
frontend/src/components/ImageGenerationF: A React form component for configuring and submitting image generation parameters (art style, emotion, lighting, composition, etc.), with support for saving/loading presets and building a structured prompt string.
frontend/src/components/PromptHistory.ts: A collapsible card component that displays the user's past generated prompts sorted by timestamp, with copy-to-clipboard functionality.
frontend/src/constants/emotions.ts: Defines emotion types and data (joy, sadness, anger, fear) with three intensity levels each, plus a helper function to build an emotion keyword prompt string.
frontend/src/constants/negativePrompts.t: Defines a set of named negative prompt presets (e.g., Low Quality, Blur & Noise) as string constants for use in image generation configuration.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using TanStack Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Contains TanStack Query hooks for image generation, prompt history, and presets, along with response parsing utilities that handle various Hugging Face API error formats.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines dark/light mode CSS custom properties (oklch color tokens) for a studio-themed design system, plus fade/slide-in keyframe animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with oklch-based color tokens, custom border radii, font families, glow box shadows, accordion animations, and plugins for animate, typography, and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, summary, and existing features for the AI Image Studio app, indicating a completed redeploy of the Motoko backend and React frontend.
